Localization.Description: A connection is allowed, denied, or rejected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A {protocol} connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is allowed by the rule "{subject.name}:{subject.id}"
A {protocol} connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is allowed by the rule "{subject.name}:{subject.id}"
A {protocol} connection from host {src.host}:{src.port} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is denied by the rule "{subject.name}:{subject.id}"
A {protocol} connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} is denied by the rule "{subject.name}:{subject.id}"
